mapper.update: UPDATE TB_TERMS SET APRV_YN = CASE WHEN 2 = #{aprvStat} THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ,APRV_USER_ID = #{aprvUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT = to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE TERMS_ID = #{reqItemId}

UPDATE TB_WORD SET APRV_YN = CASE WHEN 2 = #{aprvStat} THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ,APRV_USER_ID = #{aprvUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT = to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE WORD_ID = #{reqItemId}

UPDATE TB_DOMAIN SET APRV_YN = CASE WHEN 2 = #{aprvStat} THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ,APRV_USER_ID = #{aprvUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT = to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE DOMAIN_ID = #{reqItemId}
mapper.select: SELECT w.WORD_ID as "wordId", w.WORD_NM as "wordNm" FROM TB_TERMS_WORDS tw JOIN TB_WORD w ON tw.WORD_ID = w.WORD_ID WHERE tw.TERMS_ID = #{termsId} AND w.APRV_YN = 'N'
SELECT t.TERMS_ID as "termsId", t.TERMS_NM as "termsNm" FROM TB_TERMS_WORDS tw JOIN TB_TERMS t ON tw.TERMS_ID = t.TERMS_ID WHERE tw.WORD_ID = #{wordId} AND t.APRV_YN = 'N'

SELECT REQ_ID as "reqId", APRV_STAT as "aprvStat", CASE APRV_STAT WHEN 0 THEN '요청' WHEN 2 THEN '승인' WHEN 3 THEN '반려' ELSE '기타' END as "aprvStatNm", APRV_USER_ID as "aprvUserId", to_char(to_timestamp(APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as "aprvStatUpdtDt", APRV_STAT_UPDT_RSN as "aprvStatUpdtRsn", REQ_USER_ID as "reqUserId", to_char(to_timestamp(REQ_CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as "reqCretDt" FROM TB_APRV_STATS WHERE REQ_ITEM_ID = #{reqItemId} AND REQ_TP = #{reqTp} ORDER BY APRV_STAT_UPDT_DT DESC
